description: Fragment of a letter in the hand of Shelomo b. Yehuda Gaon, confirming receipt of money, and two suftajas (payment orders), one if them which was shared by the Gaon, the av bet din, the 'Third' and a fourth person. Dating: 1033–37 CE. (Information from Goitein's index cards, CUDL, and Gil, Palestine, vol. 2, pp. 210-212, #116). VMR
description_he: שבר מכתב מגאון שלמה בן יהודה: אישור קבלת כספים ושני סופטגות (פקודות תשלום). 1033–37.
